titles.title: Thank You Jesus for the Blood

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v5 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was a wretch I remember who I was I was lost, I was blind I was running out of time

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sin separated The breach was far too wide But from the far side of the chasm You held me in your sight

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So You made a way Across the great divide Left behind Heaven's throne To build it here inside

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And there at the cross You paid the debt I owed Broke my chains, freed my soul For the first time I had hope

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Thank you Jesus for the blood applied Thank you Jesus, it has washed me white Thank you Jesus, You have saved my life Brought me from the darkness into glorious light

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You took my place Laid inside my tomb of sin You were buried for three days And then You walked right out again

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And now death has no sting And life has no end For I have been transformed By the blood of the lamb

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Thank you Jesus for the blood applied (thank you Jesus) Thank you Jesus, it has washed me white Thank you Jesus, You have saved my life Brought me from the darkness into glorious light

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: /: There is nothing stronger Than the wonder working power of the blood The blood That calls us sons and daughters We are ransomed by our Father Through the blood The blood :/

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Glory to His name Glory to His name There to my heart was the blood applied Glory to His name
